insight_events.title: Core business accelerating
insight_events.summary: Core operating metrics (operating income, revenues) are accelerating together — growth moved from -20.8% to +97.2% YoY for two consecutive quarters. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.

top_claims.claim: Core operating metrics (operating income, revenues) are accelerating together — growth moved from -20.8% to +97.2% YoY for two consecutive quarters. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
Smith Scott Andrew reported an insider sale of 606,798 shares ($9,028,053).

Viatris is a post-merger generic pharma operator simplifying its portfolio, paying down debt, and returning cash while Idorsia Phase III assets (selatogrel, cenerimod) offer filing-backed upside. Normalized owner cash blends 50% Marvin floor ($1.45/sh from FY2025 operating cash flow) and 50% Rosen cash-yield normalizat
We expect **13.11%** per year over 7 years at **~$15.69** on **$1.5/sh** starting owner cash.
